channels.display_name: Owner-controlled blog or product dev log

official_refs.note: Local source-of-truth for claim bank and review gates.

capabilities.delete_or_rollback: Remove or archive the post from the owner-controlled surface; keep source hash and withdrawal note.

channels.auth_or_access: Owner controls the surface. No repository-stored account credential is allowed.
policy_risks: public marketing claim may imply investment advice, paid signals, performance, or KIS clearance
manual publish still needs Owner and Compliance Officer approval
required_before_live: Compliance Officer reviews final public copy
source hash and rollback note are recorded
channels.recommendation: Use as the first preview destination only after claim review; keep automated publication out of v1.

official_refs.note: Manage Posts endpoints cover creating and deleting posts for authenticated users.
Posting and deleting posts require user-context auth with read/write/user scopes.
Automation must comply with X rules and developer policy; spam, API abuse, rate-limit evasion, and non-API website scripting are high-risk.

capabilities.create: Create a post through X API only after Owner app setup, user authorization, and publication approval.
capabilities.update: Post editing support depends on current X endpoint and access tier; treat as not guaranteed.
capabilities.delete_or_rollback: Delete only posts authored by the authenticated user; also record withdrawal text and local source hash.

channels.auth_or_access: Requires Owner-controlled X developer app and user authorization. No token, app key, or callback secret may be stored in repo artifacts.
policy_risks: automated-account disclosure and human-account linkage requirements
required_before_live: Owner creates or approves the developer app and connected account
minimal write scope and callback policy are reviewed
Compliance Officer approves the exact public copy
dry-run audit queue records source hash, approver, planned text, and deletion path
channels.recommendation: Eligible for future approval-queue design, but live X posting remains Owner/R3.

official_refs.note: Posts API supports post lifecycle operations with versioned REST headers and delete behavior.
Community Management APIs cover organization and brand post management use cases.
LinkedIn Marketing APIs are versioned and older versions sunset on a schedule.

capabilities.create: Create personal or organization posts only with the applicable permission and page/admin role.
capabilities.update: Partial updates depend on post type and API version; require per-release review.
capabilities.delete_or_rollback: Delete through the versioned Posts API where permitted; batch delete is not a v1 assumption.

channels.auth_or_access: Requires Owner-approved developer app, OAuth permission, and the correct member or organization role. No credential or app verification material belongs in the repo.
policy_risks: API version sunset and migration drift
organization posting requires appropriate page role
private or restricted permissions may require platform approval
professional-network public claims need compliance review
required_before_live: Owner chooses personal profile versus organization page
required permission and page role are confirmed
current API version is refreshed before implementation
Compliance Officer approves public copy and CTA
channels.recommendation: Good candidate for professional dev-log distribution after manual preview; live API work remains Owner/R3.

official_refs.note: Instagram Platform content publishing covers supported media publishing flows.
Media publish endpoint is part of the publishing flow.
Platform capabilities change; delete behavior and version changes must be checked before implementation.

capabilities.create: Content publishing may be possible through Meta's Instagram Platform for supported account types and media.
capabilities.update: Treat post editing as unsupported in v1 unless official docs for the selected account type prove otherwise.
capabilities.delete_or_rollback: Delete capability must be confirmed for the selected API version and media type before scheduling any publish.

channels.auth_or_access: Requires Owner Meta app/account setup, account-type confirmation, permissions, and app review where applicable. No tokens or account data may be committed.
policy_risks: requires correct Instagram account type and Meta app setup
media asset requirements may force a separate asset pipeline
platform version and permission review may change
visual public claims can still imply performance or financial-service promises
required_before_live: Owner confirms Instagram account type and Meta app path
media asset rules are converted into a separate rendering gate
delete or withdrawal behavior is verified in a sandbox or non-public test path
Compliance Officer approves captions and visual claims
channels.recommendation: Defer live API publishing; keep Instagram as manual caption/image draft source until a media pipeline exists.

official_refs.note: NAVER announced the shutdown of the login-based Blog Open API write function effective 2020-05-06.
Naver Blog sharing flow is user-driven through a login/share popup, not an automated post API for v1.
Current public Blog API surface is search-oriented, not write automation.

capabilities.create: Automated write API should be treated as unavailable. Owner may manually write or use Naver share UI after review.
capabilities.delete_or_rollback: Manual deletion or correction by Owner in Naver account UI.

channels.auth_or_access: Do not implement automated Naver Blog posting in v1. No Naver login session, credential, or browser automation is allowed.
policy_risks: bulk or repetitive automated posting was part of the shutdown rationale
browser automation or login scripting would cross platform and Owner/R3 boundaries
required_before_live: Owner manually reviews and posts if desired
no API or browser automation path is built
Compliance Officer approves final public text
channels.recommendation: Classify as manual-only. Use Naver Blog as a copy draft target, not as an automated publishing channel.

required_preflight_checks_before_any_fut: refresh current official docs for the chosen channel
confirm platform account type and permission path
run local prohibited-claim and prohibited-automation gates
record source hash and dry-run preview
obtain Owner approval for the exact channel and content
obtain Compliance Officer review for public financial, performance, recommendation, KIS, legal, tax, or regulatory wording

next_local_slices.scope: Define draft -> review -> approved -> scheduled -> blocked -> live-recorded states with live action disabled by default.
Create local dry-run preview records from approved draft inputs without network calls or token handling.
Convert per-channel text/media limits into local rendering requirements without exporting final public assets.
